ground_truth.title: Start Here with Machine Learning
ground_truth.main_content: Need Help Getting Started with Applied Machine Learning? These are the Step-by-Step Guides that You've Been Looking For! The most common question is how do I get started. The best advice is broken down into a 5-step process: adjust mindset, pick a process, pick a tool, practice on datasets, and build a portfolio. The benefit of machine learning are the predictions and the models that make predictions. To have skill at applied machine learning means knowing how to consistently and reliably deliver high-quality predictions on problem after problem. The page covers foundations including Probability, Statistics, Linear Algebra, Optimization, and Calculus. Beginner topics include Python Skills, ML Algorithms, Weka, Python with scikit-learn, and R with caret. Intermediate topics include coding algorithms from scratch, XGBoost, Deep Learning with Keras and PyTorch. Advanced topics include LSTM, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, GANs, Attention, and Transformers.
with: The most common question I'm asked is: 'how do I get started?'
My best advice for getting started in machine learning is broken down into a 5-step process
The benefit of machine learning are the predictions and the models that make predictions
Probability is the mathematics of quantifying and harnessing uncertainty
Linear algebra is an important foundation area of mathematics required for achieving a deeper understanding of machine learning algorithms
